svg.title: Cutting internal leaks from customer-facing copy
svg.desc: Audit every reader-visible string for eight kinds of backstage leakage, ask whether each sentence serves the reader's next action in this place, then cut unneeded material, rewrite internal language, or relocate useful facts. High-stakes surfaces receive two independent reviews.
svg.text: CUSTOMER-FACING COPY AUDIT
LLM-DRAFTED PROSE
Input: every reader-visible string, including UI labels, tooltips, alt text,
errors, empty states, charts, metadata, documentation, and marketing copy.
1 · SWEEP TWICE
Grep the visible strings
Find machinery tokens, “real/really,” TL;DR, failure words, raw fields, and repeated em dashes.
Then read every string end to end
The worst leaks describe intent, condescend, or manipulate. They have no reliable keyword.
2 · CLASSIFY THE LEAK
MACHINERY
Implementation vocabulary reaches the reader.
FOURTH WALL / MAKING-OF
The copy references its author or construction.
DEVICE NARRATION
The copy announces its own structure or intent.
FAILURE-FORWARD
Reassurance creates a doubt before it exists.
CONDESCENSION
The reader's own tools are explained back to them.
CORRECTION SCAR
The clean artifact records the flaw it just fixed.
QUIET PART OUT LOUD
The copy narrates the persuasion it is performing.
STYLE SIGNATURE
Mechanical rhythm exposes the model's default voice.
3 · APPLY ONE TEST TO EVERY SENTENCE
Does this serve the reader's next action, here and in these words?
CUT
Not needed: delete self-explanation, reassurance, or persuasion narration.
REWRITE
Right fact, wrong words: replace internal vocabulary with reader language.
RELOCATE
Right fact, wrong place: move it to the surface where the question occurs.
Failure-forward: remove or relocate; a positive reframe still plants the doubt.
Correction scar: the finished artifact keeps no memory of the old flaw.
High-stakes surface: run two independent hunters, then adjudicate their disagreement.
OUTPUT + COMPLETION
Clean copy that speaks from the reader's side of the screen.
Complete when every visible surface was read and each sentence serves the reader where it appears.
cutting-internal-leaks-from-copy
